name: 300 Cash Loans
description_short: 300 Cash Loans New Albany, Ohio — 300 Cash Loans offers payday loans and installment loans in California with no hard credit check and next-business-day...
description_long: 300 Cash Loans is a California-based payday and installment lender operating physical branch locations in Escondido, El Dorado Hills, and Agoura Hills. The company positions itself as a local, community-oriented lender focused on serving residents who need short-term emergency cash. The Escondido branch, managed by Patrick Wilcox, serves the 92025 zip code area and is open seven days a week from 8am to 10pm. 300 Cash Loans offers three core products: payday loans, installment loans, and check cashing. Their payday loans are short-term cash advances typically ranging from $50 to $1,000, repaid in a lump sum by the borrower's next payday — generally within 30 days. Repayment is handled via automatic electronic withdrawal from the borrower's checking account. Check cashing is also available in-branch. What distinguishes 300 Cash Loans operationally is its no-hard-credit-check policy, meaning applications do not trigger inquiries to Equifax, Experian, or TransUnion. The company accepts applicants with poor or fair credit. Extended branch hours (8am–10pm, seven days a week) give borrowers access outside normal banking hours. Funding is delivered via direct deposit as soon as the next business day after approval, and the application can be completed online or in person. Honestly, 300 Cash Loans is a conventional payday lender with all the associated risks. The loan costs — principal plus lender interest — must be repaid in a single lump sum within 30 days, which is the structure most associated with debt-cycle traps when borrowers cannot repay in full. No APR figures are published on the website, which is a transparency gap. Active-duty military are explicitly ineligible under federal law (Military Lending Act). This product is best treated as a last resort for genuine emergencies, not routine cash flow management.
address: 6530 W Campus Oval suite 180, New Albany, OH 43054

company_info.headquarters: 6530 W Campus Oval suite 180, New Albany, OH 43054

pros: No hard credit check through major bureaus — does not lower your credit score on application
Bad credit and poor credit accepted
Open 7 days a week, 8am–10pm — accessible outside standard banking hours
In-person branch with named branch manager (Patrick Wilcox) for accountability
Multiple California locations (Escondido, El Dorado Hills, Agoura Hills)
Online application available in addition to in-branch service
cons: Payday loans require lump-sum repayment within ~30 days — high rollover risk if funds aren't available
No APR or fee schedule published on the website — cost of borrowing is opaque
Active-duty military are ineligible per federal regulations
Only three physical locations, all in California — not available to borrowers outside the state
Loan amounts capped around $1,000, limiting usefulness for larger emergencies
best_for: California residents near Escondido, El Dorado Hills, or Agoura Hills with bad or no credit
Borrowers facing genuine one-time emergencies (car repair, medical bills, utility shutoff) who can repay in full by next payday
People who prefer in-person lending with a local branch contact
Borrowers who have been declined by traditional banks or credit unions
diagnosis: 300 Cash Loans is best for California residents with poor credit who need small-dollar emergency cash quickly and live near one of the three branch locations. The main caveat is that these are standard high-cost payday loans with a lump-sum repayment structure — borrowers who cannot repay in full by their next payday face significant rollover risk and escalating fees.
services: Same or next-business-day funding via direct deposit
Automatic repayment via electronic bank withdrawal
